9: 10: Kimaki is a Discord bot that lets you control [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai) coding sessions from Discord. The CLI guides you through everything. 19: 20: ## What is Kimaki? 21: 22: Kimaki connects Discord to OpenCode, a coding agent similar to Claude Code.
